<!-- source-snippet repo="splice" path="docs/src/validator_operator/validator_disaster_recovery.rst" commit="889595d950391fec6acb767c4750ab37bd189a4b" snippet="splice-rst-code-docs-src-validator-operator-validator-disaster-recovery-parsed-literal-443" location="lines:443-444" -->
```bash
// Make sure to adjust YOUR_VALID_FROM to the time you got from the previous query and YOUR_PARY_ID
curl -sSL --fail-with-body '|gsf_scan_url|/api/scan/v0/acs/YOUR_PARTY_ID?record_time=YOUR_VALID_FROM' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' | jq -r .acs_snapshot | base64 -d > acs_snapshot
```
